programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Overton identifies the mugger who stole the ring he bought for Synclaire and finally proposes.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max fights her opponent's smear tactics; Khadijah faces a libel suit.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine reconsiders her relationship with Keith and dines with Russell.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Synclaire and Overton take a marriage compatibility test; Max obsesses over a cafe waiter.

programme.desc: To save Flavor, Khadijah sells a partial interest to a conglomerate; Synclaire attempts to cheer up Regine.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine becomes a juror in a high-profile case; Synclaire helps an unemployed actor.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Kyle attends his high-school reunion and confronts the school bully, who is leading a rather grim existence.

programme.sub-title: I've Got You Under My Skin
programme.desc: Regine helps a couple plan a graveyard wedding; Khadijah dates her anesthesiologist.

programme.desc: Quarterback Jeff Blake mistakenly attends Max and Gary's dinner party.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Synclaire realizes her true talent when she stands in as the lead in a play.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Khadijah and her new beau attend a holiday event with the snobbish medical elite.

programme.title: Three's Complicated
programme.desc: A 42-year-old divorcee has a whirlwind weekend fling with a man 10 years her junior. Things return to normal until she suspects she might be pregnant and discovers that her weekend lover may be her daughter's new boyfriend.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Jasmine's investment idea backfires after Imunique inducts her into an investment club; the group gets scammed and must call Pookie and Nem to retrieve their funds.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Bridget had a pregnancy scare; Latrell takes advantage of Imunique and Fabian.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Latrell and Imunique find a lot of money; Delroy has been kidnapped.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. astounds the family with the news that he plans to marry the "weirdo" of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. decides to elope without learning some important facts about his bride.

programme.desc: Grandma and Grandpa Huxtable celebrate their 50th wedding anniversary with the Count Basie Orchestra.

programme.desc: To save Flavor, Khadijah sells a partial interest to a conglomerate; Synclaire attempts to cheer up Regine.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a sheltered, small-town girl is killed in the big city, it looks like she was the unintentional victim of a drive-by shooting; police soon uncover a shocking cell phone video that could be the smoking gun needed to break the case.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A mother of four suddenly vanishes, and her family fears the worst when they make a shocking discovery - she's left behind her medication needed for several life-threatening health conditions; investigators race to find her.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young dancer believes she's found her soul mate when she meets a handsome man who promises to make her a star; desperate to earn his love, she makes a deal with the devil; for a shot at the spotlight it will cost her body and her soul.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A single mom rekindles a relationship with her high school sweetheart after fate brings them together; their "happily ever after" is doomed when a risky idea to save their family ends in bloodshed; their loyalty to each other is tested.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young, aspiring actress falls madly in love with her older boss, and his toxic love manipulates her; she agrees to go down a dark and deadly path to prove her devotion to him.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.sub-title: I've Got the Muse in Me
programme.desc: Freddie turns to alcohol when she lacks inspiration in her writing.

programme.desc: Fred pretends to suffer from whiplash when he has an accident in the pickup truck.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred schemes to get Lamont to marry a distant cousin in the hopes of obtaining her dowry.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred's fiancee brings a patient who is under her care to dinner at the Sanford home.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: When Fred gets a toothache, he insists that Lamont find a white dentist to cure him.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is convinced that Lamont's card-playing buddies are trying to take him for all his money.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: A burglar leaves his gun in the Sanford house after Lamont and Rollo scare him off.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is beside himself when his new Puerto Rican neighbor opens a competing junkyard.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred accidentally fires an antique gun and fears the worst when his neighbor doesn't answer.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is forced to find a new partner for the junkyard when Lamont seeks employment elsewhere.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.sub-title: Sanford and Son and Sister Makes Three
programme.desc: Lamont discovers that his new fiancee may actually be his half sister.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: A bum threatens to sue Fred when he accidentally injures himself in the junkyard.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred invites his fiancee and a door-to-door saleswoman to dinner on the same evening.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: When Fred receives a slight injury in a car mishap, Lamont hires a housekeeper to help out.

programme.title: The Bobby DeBarge Story
programme.desc: The singer struggles with fame and fortune while coping with his dysfunctional childhood.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Adonis elicits jealousy from Fabian when his boyfriend recruits him for a dance competition; it appears that she is placing him in the closet again.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: Get the Hell Out Before I Delout
programme.desc: Delroy's wildly-successful former-protégé buys out Del Jones Realty; a game night with the gang at the condo goes terribly wrong and turns everyone against each other.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Jasmine gets serious with Terrence but discovers that he's a wanted drug dealer.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The numbers king of the neighborhood commissions J.J. to paint a portrait.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Michael's research for a bicentennial report leads to strange happenings for the Evans family.

programme.desc: Theo is inspired by a school speaker and asks his parents for flying lessons.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Vanessa is labeled a conceited rich girl after two girls visit her home.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When the grisly remains of a beloved football coach are found in his Texas home, detectives and loved ones desperately search for answers.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: These high school sweethearts were on the verge of having it all, when one of them suddenly disappeared; police suspect he left by choice until a grisly discovery in the woods uncovers a darker story hiding beneath the surface of his idyllic life.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A high school freshman falls in love for the first time when she meets an edgy troublemaker; she becomes desperate to show him her love has no bounds; she discovers there's a fine line between proving your love and going too far.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman who is committed to her faith is lured in by the idea of holy matrimony; she soon learns that her "man of God" is no saint; his violent temper leads her down a road of crime, abuse and destruction.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A beautiful bartender believes she has found her soulmate when she is charmed by an up-and-coming rapper; when a fun night out takes a shockingly violent turn, she decides to put her man first and sacrifice everything to protect him.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Dwayne and Ron's friendship is strained after they pledge a fraternity.

programme.desc: Laz Alonso reveals his journey from Washington, D.C. to Hollywood; leaving Wall Street to pursue acting, breaking through stereotypes, and landing major roles in Avatar, Jumping the Broom, and The Boys.
